title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MAGUINDA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MAGUINDA, BUTUAN CITY, TO SANTIAGO B. ECLEO, SR., MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 25825 / 88 OG No. 34, 5491 (Aug. 24, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7631, July 17, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MAGUINDA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MAGUINDA, BUTUAN CITY, TO SANTIAGO B. ECLEO, SR., MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Maguinda Elementary School in Barangay Maguinda, Butuan City, is hereby changed to Santiago B. Ecleo, Sr., Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and January 27, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: July 17, 1992

(Sgd.) FIDEL V. RAMOS

President of the Philippines
